title: Crispy Smoked Sausage Skewers
description: A traditional German-inspired dish featuring crispy smoked sausages on skewers, perfect for a summer barbecue.

ingredients.name: Crispy Smoked Sausages (Croatian)
ingredients.notes: Available at most German butcher shops

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: Wooden or metal skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes before use

instructions: Soak skewers in water for 30 minutes before use.
Cut crispy smoked sausages into 5cm pieces.
Thread 2-3 sausage pieces onto each skewer, leaving space between each piece.
If using tofu, cut into small cubes and thread onto skewers.
Brush skewers with a little bit of oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until sausage is nicely charred.
Remove skewers from grill and let rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
